narrative:
Broadview Heights-01-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,267 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points.
